arts.ttl: Man Utd and Tottenham in top 10 - the most valuable squads in the 24/25 Europa League
arts.sum: The new-look Europa League for the 24/25 season is well and truly underway and while most will be keeping their gaze firmly placed on the Champions League, Europe’s secondary competition...

arts.ttl: Vaclav Cerny plotting Rangers path to second Europa League Final chance as Ajax heartache still lingers
arts.sum: Injury robbed Cerny of the chance to face Manchester United in the 2017 Final in Stockholm
